## WAFFLE chart, LEX style

Render as SVG (or equivalent) on a 960x540 px canvas.
Every position, size, and color below is exact. No adjectives, no improvisation.

### AI metadata (for agent routing)
```json
{
  "code": "CH-PTW-06",
  "ovp_version": "1.0",
  "intent": [
    "share",
    "part-to-whole"
  ],
  "form": "10x10 unit grid, one share",
  "data_required": "one percentage of one whole; the most honest single-share visual",
  "family": "PTW",
  "alternatives": [
    "CH-PTW-03 (two or three shares)"
  ],
  "see_instead": [
    {
      "when": "more than one share",
      "use": "CH-PTW-01"
    }
  ]
}
```

Use when:
- one share communicated with countable units: 62 of every 100
- audiences who distrust abstract charts (units are literal)

Do NOT use when:
- multiple shares (stacked bar or pie)
- shares under 3% (invisible cells)

### Input data shape
```json
{
  "title": "action title restating the share in units",
  "source": "bottom-left always",
  "percent": "0-100",
  "label": "what the share is of"
}
```

### Exact layout (px on the canvas, follow literally)
```json
{
  "canvas": {
    "width": 960,
    "height": 540
  },
  "layout": {
    "title": {
      "x": 32,
      "y": 56,
      "y_with_eyebrow": 88,
      "size": 24
    },
    "kicker": {
      "x": 32,
      "y": 28,
      "w": 24,
      "h": 4
    },
    "eyebrow": {
      "x": 32,
      "y": 52,
      "size": 11,
      "letter_spacing": 2
    },
    "source": {
      "x": 32,
      "y": 516,
      "size": 11
    },
    "grid": {
      "x": 96,
      "y": 140,
      "cell": 26,
      "gap": 6
    },
    "big": {
      "offset": 48,
      "dy": 40,
      "size": 56
    }
  },
  "scale": {
    "note": "cells fill bottom-up, left-right; filled = round(percent)"
  }
}
```

### Rules
- exactly 100 cells; filled count = rounded percent
- fill bottom-up so the grid reads like a container
- the big number restates the percent beside the grid

### Never do this
- icon waffles (pictogram people)
- multi-color waffles
- partial cells

### QA before delivering
- [ ] cell count = 100
- [ ] filled = round(percent)
- [ ] big number matches
- [ ] source present

### Colors (resolved, use these exact values)

| Element | Color |
|---|---|
| background | `#FFFFFF` |
| filled | `#7A1F1F` |
| empty | `#CCCCCC` |
| label | `#333333` |
| title | `#1A1A1A` |
| source | `#333333` |

### Fonts

- Title font: Georgia,serif, weight 700
- All other text: Georgia,serif, weight 400 (600 on highlighted items)

### Language chrome

No kicker, no eyebrow; title at the default y.
